name: ENCORE CAPITAL GROUP INC
summary: PART I Item1Business Our Business We are an international specialty finance company providing debt recovery solutions and other related services for consumers across a broad range of financial assets. We primarily purchase portfolios of defaulted consumer receivables at deep discounts to face value and manage them by working with individuals as they repay their obligations and work toward financial recovery. Defaulted receivables are consumers unpaid financial obligations to credit originators, ...
